input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.9.2.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.9.2.4
            TITLE: any wet cell battery located in the driver compartment must be enclosed in a nonconductive

            CONTENT:
            rule T.9.2.4: Any wet cell battery located in the driver compartment must be enclosed in a nonconductive
T.9.2.4 Any wet cell battery located in the driver compartment must be enclosed in a nonconductive 
marine type container or equivalent.

final_answer: Any wet cell battery located in the driver compartment must be enclosed in a nonconductive marine type container or equivalent.
